programme.title: The Torture Chamber of Dr. Sadism
programme.desc: A revived nobleman who took the lives of 12 young women to live forever is out to get revenge on the daughter of the woman meant to be his 13th victim and the son of the legal official who sentenced him.

programme.title: The Little Shop Of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man working at an impoverished flower shop discovers that the strange plant he has been nurturing has an insatiable appetite for blood, forcing him to kill to feed it.

programme.title: Khumba
programme.desc: Rejected by his superstitious herd, a half-striped zebra embarks on a daring quest to earn his stripes but finds the courage and self-acceptance to save all the animals of the Great Karoo.

programme.title: A Stork's Journey
programme.desc: Richard is a sparrow. Orphaned at birth and raised by storks, he believes that he is a stork, too! But when winter comes and his adoptive flock prepare to migrate to Africa, his true identity is revealed and his family must leave him behind in the forest with the other sparrows. Determined to prove he is a stork after all, Richard ventures south on an epic adventure, accompanied by friends big and small, to unleash his true potential and be reunited with his family.

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Honey Games
programme.desc: Maya is a determined little bee, but sometimes her determination can get her into sticky situations. When Maya accidentally embarrasses the Empress of Buzztropolis, she is forced to venture beyond her colony and team up with a group of mis-fit bugs in a bid to win The Honey Games and save her life.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Dad Longworth and Rio hit up a bank in Mexico, but Dad bails with the cash, leaving Rio to get caught by the Rurales. After five years, Rio breaks out and is set on getting back at Dad. But then, things get complicated when he falls for Dad’s step-daughter.

programme.title: 'Neath The Arizona Skies
programme.desc: A cowboy escorts a little girl, whose mother made her the heir of a cash-able oil company, and must protect her from an outlaw as they search for the girl's father.

programme.title: One Of Our Aircraft Is Missing
The Trouble With Spies
programme.desc: British spy George Trent goes missing in Ibiza. Appleton Porter heads over to look into it, chatting with folks staying at the hotel who were Trent's neighbors. Trent dodges a few murder attempts as he figures out what's going on.

programme.title: Meet The Spartans
programme.desc: A spoof of 300 (2006) and many other movies, TV series/shows/commercials, video games and celebrities. King Leonidas of Sparta and his army of 12 go to war against Xerxes of Persia to fight to the death for Sparta's freedom.

programme.title: The Onion Movie
programme.desc: Satirical interpretations of world events and curious human behavior.

programme.title: Damage
programme.desc: An older politician begins an affair with his son's fiancée, leading to a series of devastating events.

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town, four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man, but after the court sets them free, they begin to mysteriously experience deadly "accidents."
